name: Piproot
habitat: The meadow along the old cable route
description: A small round root-spirit with leaf-shaped ears and glowing seed markings.

name: Rillet
description: A droplet-shaped Echo with a fin crest that ripples when it laughs.

name: Emberkin
personality: Sleepy, warm, endlessly loyal to the café.
ability: Keeps shared meals from ever going cold.
description: A round hearth-spirit with a tiny flame wisp that brightens when it's happy.
